name: multi-model-agents
description: AI Agent Swarm V1.5.2 strengthens Custom Agent spawn contracts so primary-coder must call Opus/Claude MCP tools and tester must call Gemini MCP tools instead of self-executing those roles.

interface.shortDescription: AI Agent Swarm V1.5.2: Custom Agent spawn contracts for Opus/Claude coding and Gemini test analysis.
interface.longDescription: AI Agent Swarm V1.5.2 is a local Codex multi-model orchestration plugin for long-running development. Codex keeps planning, authorization, real tests, review integration, RAG writes, and final decisions. Opus/Claude performs primary coding through the primary-coder Custom Agent calling multi_model_coder_workspace_edit. Gemini provides test strategy and failure-log analysis through the tester Custom Agent calling multi_model_tester_plan. This release strengthens the Custom Agent prompts and startup workflow so visible role subagents cannot silently substitute their own Codex reasoning for the configured external model role.
capabilities: 本地项目记忆库（轻量 RAG）
defaultPrompt: 使用 AI Agent Swarm 处理这次代码修改，默认启用可见角色子智能体工作流。
